actor_claims.quote_text: the Thoma Bravo Fund has committed to purchase, or cause the purchase of, $548,148,554 plus, solely and to the extent necessary in order to pay any additional fees and expenses required by the merger agreement to be paid by Parent after taking into account the amount of available cash of Imprivata at the closing, up to an additional $20,000,000 of equity securities of Parent

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: On July 13, 2016, Parent entered into an equity commitment letter, which we refer to as the “ equity commitment letter ” with the Thoma Bravo Fund, pursuant to which the Thoma Bravo Fund has committed to purchase, or cause the purchase of, $548,148,554 plus, solely and to the extent necessary in order to pay any additional fees and expenses required by the merger agreement to be paid by Parent after taking into account the amount of available cash of Imprivata at the closing, up to an additional $20,000,000 of equity securities of Parent
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: equity commitment to purchase, or cause the purchase of, equity securities of Parent

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: The merger agreement provides that Parent and/or Merger Sub may obtain debt financing to offset a portion of the funds required to consummate the transactions contemplated by the merger agreement, but the merger is not conditioned on Parent’s ability to obtain debt financing.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: may obtain debt financing to offset a portion of the funds required to consummate the transactions contemplated by the merger agreement

event_claims.description: Parent entered into an equity commitment letter with the Thoma Bravo Fund, under which the Thoma Bravo Fund committed to purchase, or cause the purchase of, equity securities of Parent.
event_claims.quote_text: On July 13, 2016, Parent entered into an equity commitment letter, which we refer to as the “ equity commitment letter ” with the Thoma Bravo Fund, pursuant to which the Thoma Bravo Fund has committed to purchase, or cause the purchase of, $548,148,554 plus, solely and to the extent necessary in order to pay any additional fees and expenses required by the merger agreement to be paid by Parent after taking into account the amount of available cash of Imprivata at the closing, up to an additional $20,000,000 of equity securities of Parent

event_claims.description: The merger is not conditioned on Parent's ability to obtain debt financing.
event_claims.quote_text: The merger agreement provides that Parent and/or Merger Sub may obtain debt financing to offset a portion of the funds required to consummate the transactions contemplated by the merger agreement, but the merger is not conditioned on Parent’s ability to obtain debt financing.
